title: Not equal evaluation does not work
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id INTEGER, value VARCHAR(10), status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t3 (id, value, status) VALUES (1, 'active', TRUE), (2, 'inactive', FALSE), (3, 'active', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE t4 (id INTEGER, score FLOAT, description LONG VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO t4 (id, score, description) VALUES (1, 10.5, 'first'), (2, 20.0, 'second'), (3, NULL, 'third');
SELECT t3.id, t3.value, t4.score FROM t3 JOIN t4 ON t3.value <> CAST(t4.score AS VARCHAR) WHERE t3.id > 1;
key_bug_features: Not equal evaluation in SQL query fails
